_about: Entities — AdminEntity tag (AdminEntityController). All endpoints require the global Admin role.

GET /api/v1/admin/entity/blob.description: Returns an entity straight from the blob data store, serialised with the persisting flavor. When `organizationId` is supplied the request impersonates that organisation. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/entity/blob/compressed.description: Returns the encrypted blob backing an entity as a downloadable file, decrypting in place and setting the original filename, MIME type, MD5 (if known), and modification date on the response. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/processedentity/blob.description: Returns the processed-entity record from the blob data store, serialised with the persisting flavor. Returns 404 if the processed entity does not exist. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/processedentity/blob/c.description: Returns the processed entity record as a downloadable, compressed file with `.processedentity` filename suffix. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/entity/graph.description: Returns an entity straight from the graph data store, serialised with the persisting flavor. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/entity/search.description: Returns an entity straight from the search data store, serialised with the persisting flavor. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/entity/clue.description: Reads an entity from the blob store and synthesises a `Clue` that mirrors its codes, properties, edges, and metadata, then serialises the clue. Useful for re-ingesting an entity. Admin-only.

POST /api/v1/admin/entity/mergeEntities.description: Forces a merge of the supplied source entity ids into a target entity (under impersonated organisation), running the merge pipeline with `ForceMerging=true` and `ManualMergeActionKind`. Admin-only.

POST /api/v1/admin/entity/deduplicateedg.description: Removes duplicate relationships on the supplied entity in the graph data store. Admin-only.

DELETE /api/v1/admin/deletebyid.description: Dispatches a `DeleteEntityCommand` for the supplied entity id under impersonated organisation. Returns 200 once the command has been queued. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/codelookup.description: Returns entity-code lookup results matching the supplied code, scoped to the impersonated organisation. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/organizations.description: Returns the profile of every organisation in the platform. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/allproviders.description: Returns every provider registered in the system (category, details, id, enabled flag, name, type), ordered by name. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/getAllEntityTypes.summary: Admin: list entity types by type
GET /api/v1/admin/getAllEntityTypes.description: Returns every entity type known to the platform that matches the supplied type filter. Admin-only.

parameters.type: Entity type technical name to filter by.

POST /api/v1/admin/toggleproviderstatus.description: Sets a provider's `IsEnabled` flag and publishes a `ProviderEnabledNotification` or `ProviderDisabledNotification`. Returns 404 if the provider id cannot be found. Admin-only.

parameters.value: True to enable, false to disable.

GET /api/v1/admin/configuration.description: Returns a dictionary of every key/value pair from the application configuration (`AppSettings`). Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/agentjobs.description: Returns the agent-job records stored for the organisation. The endpoint accepts optional `organizationId`, `from`, and `to` parameters (the date range parameters are accepted but currently ignored — the same underlying query is used either way). Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/webhooks.description: Returns the webhook definitions stored for the organisation (or the impersonated organisation when `organizationId` is supplied). Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/generatetoken.description: Stub endpoint currently routed to the agent-jobs query under impersonated organisation context. The name suggests it is intended for impersonation-token generation; treat the current response shape as implementation-defined. Admin-only.

GET /api/v1/admin/vocabs.description: Returns vocabulary keys across every vocabulary in the organisation whose name starts with `q`. Admin-only.

parameters.q: Prefix to match against vocabulary key names.

GET /api/v1/admin/vocabs/type.summary: Admin: get vocabulary keys by type
GET /api/v1/admin/vocabs/type.description: Returns vocabulary keys across every vocabulary in the organisation whose name equals `type`. Admin-only.

POST /api/v1/admin/previewImage.summary: Admin: build a preview image part
POST /api/v1/admin/previewImage.description: Builds a `RawDataPart` of type `/RawData/PreviewImage` from a supplied URL (downloads it server-side) or a raw byte array, and returns the resulting image reference. Admin-only.

parameters.q: Either a URL to download or a byte array (depending on overload).
